name: Kahortagga Hypothermia (H -- MARCH)
description: La dagaalanka hypothermia waa dilaaga hormoodka ah ee lagaga hortagi karo dhaawaca. Triad-ka dilaaga ah: hypothermia + acidosis + coagulopathy. Ka hortag kharash kasta.
steps: Ka saar dhammaan dharka qoyan sida ugu dhakhsaha badan ee suurtogalka ah.
Ku dabool buka bustaha kulaylka-milicsada (meel bannaan) -- dhinac dhalaalaya IN dhinaca bukaanka.
Ku duub madaxa iyo qoorta (goobta luminta kulaylka muhiimka ah).
Dahaarka dhulka -- dhig wax u dhexeeya bukaanka iyo dusha sare ee dhulka qabow.
Maamul dareere IV diiran haddii la heli karo.
Ha u oggolaan bukaanku inuu gariiro isagoon dabooli jirin --gariirku waa calaamad digniin hore.
La soco heerkulka haddii heerkulbeegga la heli karo. Ka hooseeya 35°C (95°F) = hypothermia.
warnings: Hypothermia waxay ka sii daraysaa xinjirowga dhiigga -- bukaannada dhiigbaxa si dhakhso ah ayay u qaboojiyaan oo si aan waxtar lahayn u xinjiroobin.
Ka-hortagga hypothermia goobta waa inay ka bilaabataa goobta dhaawaca, maaha CCP.
